label: Transparent sunflower motif
workflow: Generate the sunflower head on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background, copy the exact generated source to .source/motif-chroma.png, then remove the key with remove_chroma_key.py using auto-key border, soft matte, transparent threshold 12, opaque threshold 220, and despill. The final motif.png is RGBA with transparent corners.
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only an isolated sunflower head, front-facing with a very slight natural angle, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: A mature sunflower head that clearly reads as a sunflower, not a daisy or marigold: broad golden yellow petals with petal-gold highlights, dark seed-brown circular center with visible radial seed geometry, subtle leaf-green calyx and a small hint of stem or leaf only if naturally visible behind the head, crisp botanical texture, clean silhouette.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding on all sides; do not crop petals, calyx, or any visible stem/leaf.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves solar yellow petals, dark seed-brown center, leaf-green detail, and natural form.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for later removal. The background must be one uniform #ff00ff color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, lighting variation, vignette, border, or pattern. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the flower.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no prairie background, no vase, no field, no second flower, no shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection.

label: Light design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive 3840x2160-style 16:9 light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Sunflower", derived from the provided transparent sunflower head cutout. It must be a single wide board, not a poster crop.
Resolution and legibility: make the board high-resolution and very wide, with large readable labels and roomy sections. Avoid tiny token tables. Prioritize crisp readable text and clear UI examples.
Reference use: Use the visible sunflower cutout as the source of truth. Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from solar yellow petals, petal-gold highlights, dark seed-brown center, leaf-green calyx/stem, radial seed geometry, and warm prairie context. The board must visibly respect the motif colors, not generic yellow.
Required visible sections: title "Sunflower", motif story, palette swatches, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation/sidebar, optimistic metrics dashboard preview, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture/pattern guidance, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, generated asset examples.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; use readable labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric. Show guidance for an optimistic metric system and dashboard-heavy product UI.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select menu, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut/radial seed chart, empty state, error state, loading state, spacing tokens, 8px radius tokens, border and shadow tokens, subtle seed-pattern texture samples.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system board, realistic UI mockup, precise alignment, compact professional dashboard composition, 8px card radius, prairie-cream and warm sky/off-white surfaces, solar yellow actions, seed-brown text/depth, leaf-green support accents, petal-gold highlights.
Color palette labels: Solar Yellow, Petal Gold, Seed Brown, Seed Umber, Leaf Green, Prairie Cream, Pollen Wash, Warm Sky, Prairie Sage.
Text: short readable UI labels; include readable English and Japanese UI samples. Avoid long paragraphs and avoid tiny unreadable token tables.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no stock UI kit look, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Sunflower".

label: Dark design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive 3840x2160-style 16:9 dark-mode design-system board for the "Sunflower" Morphous system. It must feel like the provided light-mode Sunflower board translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent sunflower cutout and the visible light-mode Sunflower design-system board as references. Preserve the palette roles, component language, typography guidance, optimistic metrics dashboard structure, radial seed texture, spacing rhythm, and shadcn/tweakcn coverage.
Resolution and legibility: make the board high-resolution and wide, with large readable labels and roomy sections. Avoid tiny token tables. Prioritize crisp readable English and Japanese text.
Required visible sections: title "Sunflower", "Dark Mode", palette swatches, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation/sidebar, optimistic metrics dashboard preview, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture/pattern guidance, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, generated asset examples.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; use readable labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Heading, Body, Label, Numeric. Keep the same multilingual product UI guidance as the light board.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, select menu, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, command/search palette, sidebar navigation, top navigation, metric cards, line chart, bar chart, donut/radial seed chart, empty state, error state, loading state, spacing tokens, 8px radius tokens, border and shadow tokens, subtle seed-pattern texture samples.
Visual details: deep seed-brown and charcoal surfaces, warm cream readable text, solar yellow primary highlights, petal-gold focus rings, leaf-green supportive accents, seed umber borders and shadows, subtle radial seed overlays, crisp shadcn-style cards and controls. Avoid pure black dominance; use warm botanical dark surfaces.
Color palette labels: Solar Yellow, Petal Gold, Seed Brown, Seed Umber, Leaf Green, Prairie Cream, Warm Charcoal, Dark Pollen, Prairie Sage.
Text: short readable UI labels; include readable English and Japanese UI samples. Avoid long paragraphs and avoid tiny unreadable token tables.
Constraints: no neon colors, no unrelated saturated colors, no generic purple or blue gradients, no flat pure-black-only background, no illegible text, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Sunflower".
